title: Northern Trust Leaders to Speak at RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference on March 9th
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ntrs--Northern Trust Corporation announced today that Chief Financial Officer Jason Tyler and Corporate & Institutional Services President Pete Cherecwich, will speak at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference via webcast on Wednesday, March 9, 2022 at 1:00 p.m. (CT). The live webcast of the presentation may be accessed via Northern Trust's website under the events section. A replay of the webcast will be accessible for approximately four weeks a

title: 5th Century Partners Appoints Northern Trust to Support ‘Purpose-Driven' Investment Strategy
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #assetmanagement--Northern Trust will provide a range of services to 5th Century Partners, a purpose-driven private investment firm based in Chicago.

title: Northern Trust Supports AMF to Become One of the First Occupational Pension Providers in Sweden Under European IORP II Directive
text: STOCKHOLM--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) is pleased to have supported AMF Tjänstepension AB (formerly AMF Pensionsförsäkring AB) on its transformational journey to becoming one of the first occupational pension providers in Sweden under the European Institutions for Occupational Retirement Provision (IORP) II Directive. IORP II aims to improve the governance and communication standards of occupational pension schemes. The implementation of the directive demanded important chang

title: Northern Trust's 2022 Wealth Planning Symposium to Focus on Bold Ideas for Redefining Wealth
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #wealthmanagement--Northern Trust has announced its second-annual Wealth Planning Symposium, to share strategies that will help shape the future of wealth management.

title: Northern Trust Universe Data: Institutional Plans Record Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Gains in 2021
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #assetmanagement--Large institutional plans in the Northern Trust Universe gained 3.5% at the median in Q4 2021 and 14.4% for the year.

title: North Dakota Growth Fund Adds Two Investments
text: FARGO, N.D.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--North Dakota Growth Fund, Managed by 50 South Capital, Adds Two New Investments -- LongWater Opportunities and Homegrown Capital. Portfolio at $22.5M.

title: Northern Trust Asset Management's FlexShares® Expands Listing of Private Equity ETF
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Asset Management's FlexShares Exchange Traded Funds today announced the listing of the FlexShares® Listed Private Equity UCITS ETF (Ticker: FLPE), the firm's first exchange traded fund (ETF) that offers investors direct exposure to the listed private equity market. Listed today on the London Stock Exchange, the fund has attracted more than US$140 million in AUM since its launch in December 2021. FLPE tracks the Foxberry Listed Private Equity SDG Screened

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For February 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of February. Last month's list returned -4.01% in January and starts out the year on a sour note; however, it performed better than both VIG and SPY.
